external_references.description: Communications Security, Reliability, Interoperability Council (CSRIC). (2017, March). Working Group 10 Legacy Systems Risk Reductions Final Report. Retrieved May 24, 2017.

objects.name: Analytic 1753
objects.description: Defender observes anomalous signaling network queries targeting subscriber information associated with a device, including unexpected routing requests, location information exchanges, or node-origin inconsistencies indicative of SS7 signaling abuse. (Citation: CSRIC5-WG10-FinalReport) The CSRIC also suggests threat information sharing between telecommunications industry members.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: TelecomLogs:SS7Signaling
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Subscriber information queries, routing requests, or location update messages with anomalous node identifiers or unexpected origin patterns

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: TelecomLogs:MobilityEvents
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Unexpected location resolution events or abnormal subscriber tracking requests

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Defines acceptable variance for signaling node identifiers
Baseline-dependent threshold for excessive subscriber queries
Expected signaling path vs observed routing anomalies
